# lightdash_oauth_application (Data Source)

Reads a single OAuth application by `client_id`. Requires an organization admin personal access token. The client secret is not available from the API after creation.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `client_name` (String) The display name of the OAuth application.
- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the client was created.
- `created_by_user_uuid` (String) UUID of the user who created the client, if known.
- `id` (String) The data source identifier. It is computed as `organizations/<organization_uuid>/oauth_applications/<client_id>`.
- `organization_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Lightdash organization for the authenticated token.
- `redirect_uris` (List of String) Allowed OAuth redirect URIs.
- `scopes` (List of String) OAuth scopes stored on the client.
